channel.title: Software on Romulus Crisan
channel.description: Recent content in Software on Romulus Crisan

item.title: Code by the book
item.author: cromica@gmail.com (Romulus Crisan)
item.description: A few weeks back a friend of mine asked me to recommend him some programming/technical books. I was busy at that moment so I couldn’t write my recommendations but he suggested that I should write an article on my blog. I thought that it’s a great idea so here it is my list of recommendations. Although most of the times a I code in C# most of the books are technology agnostic which means every developer can read them.
